context: Saving a confirmed architectural decision about UUID primary keys in the payments-api project

checklist.name: Uses --text flag
checklist.description: Content is passed via the `--text` flag (not piped or other method)

checklist.name: Content captures the decision
checklist.description: The captured text includes the UUID primary key decision substance

checklist.name: Uses --tier semantic
checklist.description: Uses `--tier semantic` because this is a long-term architectural rule, not a time-bound event

checklist.name: Uses --project flag
checklist.description: Scopes the capture with `--project payments-api` (or similar project identifier)

checklist.name: Uses --tags flag
checklist.description: Attaches relevant tags (e.g., `--tags uuid,primary-key,schema` or similar)

checklist.name: Single coherent command
checklist.description: Produces a single valid shell command (not split into unrelated commands)
